name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry at 18494 S Dixie Hwy, Cutler Bay, FL 33157 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 1956 reviews. Call +1 305-251-7585.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The company is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the Miami community by providing quick cash solutions through pawn loans and merchandise sales.

The company offers multiple services centered on collateral-based lending and retail: pawn loans (borrowing against personal items), gold and diamond jewelry buying at competitive rates, retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise (electronics, tools, fashion, gaming equipment), layaway programs with 10% down payments, flexible payment plans through third-party financing partners (up to 12 months), and an online shop with daily new arrivals. They also provide an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation, jewelry and product protection plans, and operate a rewards program (EZ+) that tracks pawns, layaways, and offers points on eligible transactions.

Value Pawn & Jewelry differentiates itself through expert precious metals testing to ensure fair pricing on gold and diamonds, daily inventory updates, a rewards program integrated with online payment capabilities, and protection plans specific to jewelry investments. They market themselves as conveniently located and community-focused, emphasizing respectful service and fair valuations. The store carries both firearms and offers auto loans, expanding beyond typical pawn shop offerings.

This is a legitimate pawn shop suitable for consumers needing immediate cash via collateral loans or those seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve fees and terms not detailed on the website, and the company explicitly notes that not all services are available in all areas. Consumers should verify specific terms and APR/fee structures in-store before committing to loans.
address: 18494 S Dixie Hwy, Cutler Bay, FL 33157

company_info.headquarters: 18494 S Dixie Hwy, Cutler Bay, FL 33157

pros: Expert gold and diamond testing to ensure fair and accurate pricing on precious metals
Extensive inventory with 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, and fashion items
Instant Quote online tool provides estimated value for electronics within seconds without in-store visit
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program tracks pawns and layaways with online payment capability and points accumulation
Daily new merchandise arrivals and online shop with browsable inventory
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday)
cons: Pawn loan terms, fees, and APR rates not disclosed on website; customers must visit in-person to learn actual costs
Multiple service limitations: online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania; not all services available in all areas
Gold buying and pawn loan interest rates not competitively benchmarked against other local pawn shops
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable items (electronics, jewelry, tools, collectibles)
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name merchandise
People preferring layaway or extended payment plans over traditional retail financing
Sellers of gold, diamonds, and precious metals wanting expert testing and fair valuations
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash via collateral loans, or budget-conscious shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that specific loan terms, fees, and APR rates are not disclosed online, requiring in-store consultation to understand true borrowing costs before committing to a pawn transaction.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying and testing
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (electronics, tools, fashion, gaming, collectibles)
Layaway program with 10% down and monthly payments
Flexible third-party payment plans (up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility)
Instant Quote online valuation tool for electronics
Online shop with daily inventory updates
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up, free cleaning and repairs)
Product Protection Plan for computers, audio/video equipment, and merchandise
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management and points accumulation
